since_last: 61% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +2.57%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 61% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +1.18% · BTC -1.42% · Gold +0.50% · Nasdaq100 +2.25%. 61% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +2.57%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +2.57%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.18%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +31.29%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +31.29%, AMAT +3.69%, LRCX +2.95%, KLAC +2.19%, INOD +2.13%. Laggards: DLR -5.00%, TTD -3.16%, HON -1.38%, OKTA -1.00%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.49% at $163.38
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.49% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
